title: Newcastle Coders Group August: Mobile 101: Tales of Mobile Development
abstract:
In August, SSW Newcastle's own Hark Singh takes the stage with "Mobile 101: Tales of Mobile Development".

This event will be hosted at the SSW Newcastle Office.

We'd like to thank our sponsors:
* SSW
* Saphi Engineering

About Hark's Talk - Mobile 101: Tales of Mobile Development

Ever wondered what it really takes to ship a mobile app? Hark takes you on a journey through the world of mobile development - from choosing the right framework (Flutter, .NET MAUI, or React Native?) to wrangling emulators, real devices, and the dreaded app store review process.

Expect real war stories, practical tips, and the lessons you only learn the hard way - perfect for web developers curious about going mobile, and a good laugh for anyone who has already survived it.
description:
In August, SSW Newcastle's own Hark Singh takes the stage with **"Mobile 101: Tales of Mobile Development"**.

This event will be hosted at the SSW Newcastle Office.

We'd like to thank our sponsors:

* SSW
* Saphi Engineering

About Hark's Talk - **Mobile 101: Tales of Mobile Development**

Ever wondered what it really takes to ship a mobile app? Hark takes you on a journey through the world of mobile development - from choosing the right framework (Flutter, .NET MAUI, or React Native?) to wrangling emulators, real devices, and the dreaded app store review process.

Expect real war stories, practical tips, and the lessons you only learn the hard way - perfect for web developers curious about going mobile, and a good laugh for anyone who has already survived it.

**About Hark:**

Hark is a Full-Stack Developer at SSW Newcastle who builds clean, reliable software with a focus on user experience and delivery discipline. He joined SSW through FireBootCamp and works across Angular, .NET, Azure, and Flutter.
